'''âb-v-n-d''' ('''kabavnedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vanitize|vanitize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vanitize|vanitize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-v-n-d
|-
! Lemma
| kabavnedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibavnedoko|thibavnedoko]] || [[word:jibavnedoko|jibavnedoko]] || [[word:shibavnedoko|shibavnedoko]] || [[word:kibavnedoko|kibavnedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubavnedoko|thuthubavnedoko]] || [[word:jujubavnedoko|jujubavnedoko]] || [[word:shushubavnedoko|shushubavnedoko]] || [[word:kukubavnedoko|kukubavnedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubavnedoko|thubavnedoko]] || [[word:jubavnedoko|jubavnedoko]] || [[word:shubavnedoko|shubavnedoko]] || [[word:kubavnedoko|kubavnedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubavnedoko|thubavnedoko]] || [[word:jubavnedoko|jubavnedoko]] || [[word:shubavnedoko|shubavnedoko]] || [[word:kubavnedoko|kubavnedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebavnedoko|thebavnedoko]] || [[word:jebavnedoko|jebavnedoko]] || [[word:shebavnedoko|shebavnedoko]] || [[word:kebavnedoko|kebavnedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobavnedoko|thothobavnedoko]] || [[word:jojobavnedoko|jojobavnedoko]] || [[word:shoshobavnedoko|shoshobavnedoko]] || [[word:kokobavnedoko|kokobavnedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobavnedoko|thobavnedoko]] || [[word:jobavnedoko|jobavnedoko]] || [[word:shobavnedoko|shobavnedoko]] || [[word:kobavnedoko|kobavnedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobavnedoko|thobavnedoko]] || [[word:jobavnedoko|jobavnedoko]] || [[word:shobavnedoko|shobavnedoko]] || [[word:kobavnedoko|kobavnedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbavnedoko|thĂŠbavnedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbavnedoko|jĂŠbavnedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbavnedoko|shĂŠbavnedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbavnedoko|kĂŠbavnedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabavnedoko|thathabavnedoko]] || [[word:jajabavnedoko|jajabavnedoko]] || [[word:shashabavnedoko|shashabavnedoko]] || [[word:kakabavnedoko|kakabavnedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabavnedoko|thabavnedoko]] || [[word:jabavnedoko|jabavnedoko]] || [[word:shabavnedoko|shabavnedoko]] || [[word:kabavnedoko|kabavnedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabavnedoko|thabavnedoko]] || [[word:jabavnedoko|jabavnedoko]] || [[word:shabavnedoko|shabavnedoko]] || [[word:kabavnedoko|kabavnedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
